metadata.description: 6 harness commands for Claude Code and Codex: multi-agent build pipeline, documentation, code review, QA testing, frontend design, and dashboard. v4.3.0 adds Observation Grounding (observe rendered/executable output, not just exit-0), a runtime Stop hook (first runtime-enforced completion entrance), and a capability-escalation ladder. Transferred procedures; effect on claudex's model mix not yet A/B-measured.

plugins.name: claudex
plugins.description: 6 harness commands with 27 specialized agent prompts + 1 helper. v4.3.0 — Observation Grounding + Capability Escalation: a runtime Stop hook (claudex's first runtime-enforced completion entrance), observe-the-rendered-output in the verify chain (exit-0 = well-formed, not correct), a §5.1 capability-escalation ladder at the 3-retry ceiling, context-first phase decomposition, QA UNTESTABLE state. Transferred procedures (origin: fablize/prometheus); effect not yet A/B-measured. v4.2.0 — Completion Gate protocol. Commands: /harness (SINGLE/TEAM + Phase Verifier + Sentinel + Auditor), /harness-docs, /harness-review, /harness-qa (Playwright), /design, /claude-dashboard.
